owner_operator_stated: Dr. Priyanka Patel, DMD is stated as Owner/Founder of Rooted Dental Care at this address.
notes: Address (424 W Fullerton Pkwy, 2nd Floor, Chicago, IL 60614) and phone (773-404-0101) match this record exactly, confirming the vendor hint (rooteddentalchicago.com) is correct. Site notes this location was 'formerly Lincoln Park Cosmetic & General Dentistry' before rebranding as Rooted Dental Care around Dr. Patel's ownership; the record's legal name 'LINCOLN PARK DENTAL CARE LTD' is not itself stated on the site, but exact address+phone corroboration is sufficient to treat this as the current practice (no evidence of a distinct unrelated owner taking over). No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Record entity is solo pediatric dentist Dr. Erika Peters, DMD, whose aggregator profiles (Healthgrades/Sharecare) list her practice as 'Chicago Dental Professionals Inc' at 2340 N Clybourn Ave, Chicago, IL 60614, phone (773) 384-3500 -- Chicago Dental Professionals is marked CLOSED on Yelp. The address is now occupied by Apple Dental Care (multi-location pediatric dentistry/orthodontics group), confirmed via their own site listing '2340 N Clybourn Ave, Chicago, IL' as a location and a Facebook post announcing 'our new clinic opened today - 2340 N Clybourn Ave'. Apple Dental Care's published group-wide doctor roster (7 named dentists) does NOT include Dr. Erika Peters.
notes: Successor situation: the address 2340 N Clybourn Ave, 60614 matches the record, but it is now operated by Apple Dental Care (pediatric dentistry/orthodontics group with locations at 3012 W Fullerton Ave, 2062 N Milwaukee Ave, 7447 W Talcott Ave, and this Clybourn address), not by the named entity 'Peters, Erika'. The predecessor practice at this address, 'Chicago Dental Professionals Inc,' is CLOSED per Yelp. Record's phone (773) 528-2205 does not match Apple Dental Care's phone (773-384-3500) or any source found for Dr. Peters, suggesting it may be disconnected/reassigned. Apple Dental Care's team page lists 7 dentists group-wide without per-location breakdown, and none is named Erika Peters, so no roster is attributed to this specific location.

Vendor-hinted site cohdental.com (matching the 'Chicago Osteopathic Hospital Dental Clinic' also headquartered in this building, 1525 E 53rd St #522) returned ECONNREFUSED on both http and https -- the domain is dead/unreachable. NPI registry (opennpi.com) confirms the record's address (1525 E 53rd St, Suite 908, Chicago, IL 60615-4557) but lists a different phone (773-667-9200) than this record's (773) 752-7888; no live website could be found or corroborated for either number. Only third-party directory listings (Yelp, Healthgrades, BBB, WebMD, CareCredit) exist, none of which is the practice's own site, and none confirm this record's exact phone. No usable website could be verified.

Address (1370 E 53rd St, Chicago, IL 60615) and phone (773-731-3300) match this record exactly, confirming the vendor hint (comfortteeth.com). Comfort Dental Studio is a 2-location practice (this Hyde Park office plus a Pilsen office at 1253 W 18th St). 3 dentists listed on-site match the record's provider_count of 3. Checked /careers/ -- returned 404, no hiring page found.

Vendor hint (familydentalcare.com) is WRONG for this record: that site belongs to an unrelated multi-location group ('Family Dental Care, PC', 8 locations in South Chicago/Calumet City/Evergreen Park/Oak Lawn/Crestwood/Munster) whose own locations page does NOT include 444 W 31st St or phone (312) 225-1373. The correct provider at this address/phone is Dr. Pelagia (Pella) A. Lampropoulos, DDS, confirmed via multiple third-party directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, Doctors Network, CareDash) all showing 444 W 31st St, Chicago, IL 60616 and (312) 225-1373, but no independent practice-owned website could be found -- only aggregator/directory listings exist. No usable website to verify roster or hiring.

Address (2016 S Michigan Ave, Chicago, IL 60616) and phone (312-929-4783, listed as the 'Return Visits' number) match this record exactly, confirming the vendor hint (dentartchicago.com). This is a shared multi-specialty office (DentArt Chicago) hosting 7-8 doctors across specialties (prosthodontics, orthodontics, periodontics, endodontics, oral surgery, general dentistry); Dr. Bin Yang (the record's named entity, operating as DR BIN YANG DMD LTD) is one of the practicing prosthodontists there. Website-visible provider count (7) exceeds the record's provider_count (3), consistent with Dr. Yang's Ltd being one of several co-located independent legal entities sharing the office. No careers/hiring page found.
